subject: Your Amazon Order Has Been Placed — Verify Payment
body_text:
Dear Customer,

An order of ₹12,499 has been placed from your Amazon account. If this wasn't you, cancel and verify your account at: http://amaz0n-india.xyz/account/cancel-verify?order=9283764

Act within 2 hours to get a full refund.
notes: Amazon typosquatting variant — amaz0n (zero) instead of amazon
